name: HelixQA Fixes Validation — Accessibility
description: Nexus a11y-layer regression suite covering W9 Auditor.RunAndAssert end-to-end wiring.

test_cases.name: Auditor.RunAndAssert drives a live page green path (W9)

steps.name: auditor.RunAndAssert(ctx, browserEvaluator)
steps.expected: nil error AND Report.Summary has zero serious/critical violations

test_cases.expected_result: End-to-end axe-core injection + Evaluator.Eval + Parse + level assertion

fix_reference.rationale: Auditor existed but no bank drove it against a running page

test_cases.name: Auditor.RunAndAssert surfaces seeded critical violation

steps.name: Open demo page with (missing alt)
auditor.RunAndAssert(ctx, browserEvaluator)
steps.expected: non-nil error that names the missing-alt rule

test_cases.expected_result: Critical violations never pass silently at LevelAA

test_cases.name: Auditor.RunAndAssert surfaces Evaluator errors

steps.name: Pass Evaluator that returns error
steps.expected: error wrapping 'a11y: eval axe:' — original evaluator error preserved

test_cases.expected_result: Evaluator failures bubble up instead of masquerading as parse failures

test_cases.name: Injection script contains vendored path, not CDN URL

steps.name: InjectionScript('https://cdn/x')
steps.expected: script embeds '<base>/axe.min.js' from vendored path — no CDN fetch

test_cases.expected_result: axe-core never loaded from public CDN at test time
